excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Speech-Language Pathology lists 1st priority round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-11-28. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st Priority Round: 28 November 2025 2nd Priority Round: 19 December 2025 3rd Priority Round: 9 February 2026 Final round: 31 March 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Early applications are strongly encouraged.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
